text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I swing by the park and see Tokai Teio playing
with a bunch of children.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm over here, kiddos! Come and get me!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Grr! Dang it! She's too fast!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Everybody! Huddle up! We gotta catch her!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mwahaha! Not even teaming up will you help you
now! There's no way you can catch m―

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Isn't this a little extreme?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Having thirty kids be "it" is pretty cheap!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I mean, I still got away, but c'mon...
